prestazioni: Engine swap to a naturally aspirated **HD-ETi 1.6L DOHC 16V (HD-ET)** from the Daihatsu Charade GTti, retaining the original Applause's transverse FWD layout. Port and polish the cylinder head with **Toda Racing** Stage 2 porting specs (3-angle valve job, 1mm oversized intake valves, 1.2mm oversized exhaust valves) and install **Toda Racing** titanium retainers and **HKS** valve springs for 8,500 RPM redline capability. Replace the stock camshafts with **Toda Racing** Type-R cams (272° intake, 280° exhaust, 11.2mm lift) and pair with **HKS** adjustable cam gears for fine-tuning.

Forced induction via a **Garrett GT2560R** turbocharger (60mm compressor inducer, 56 trim) mounted on a **Trust/GReddy** cast manifold, paired with a **HKS** SSQV blow-off valve and a **GReddy** Type-S intercooler (400mm x 200mm x 76mm core). Custom **SARD** 60mm big-bore throttle body with **Apexi** Power FC standalone ECU (Applause-specific base map) managing **ID1000** fuel injectors and a **Walbro 255LPH** in-tank fuel pump. Boost targets set to 1.2 bar (17.4 psi) with **HKS** EVC boost controller and **GReddy** Profec B Spec II for launch control.

Drivetrain reinforcement with **OS Giken** Super Lock LSD (2-way, 40% preload) in the stock transaxle housing, paired with **PPG** 1st-4th gear sets (2.916, 1.904, 1.310, 1.030 ratios) and a **Spec Stage 3+** clutch (multi-disc, 6 puck, 2,000 lb clamping force). Replace the stock driveshafts with **Driveshaft Shop** 3.5-inch aluminum units and upgrade wheel hubs to **SPL Parts** 4x100 to 4x114.3 adapters for wider track width. Suspension overhaul with **Tein Flex Z** coilovers (8kg/mm front, 6kg/mm rear springs, 24-way adjustable damping) and **Whiteline** 22mm front / 19mm rear adjustable sway bars.
estetica: Full **C-West** Type-R widebody conversion kit (fiberglass fenders, front bumper, rear bumper, side skirts) with **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (3-piece, vented) and **Veilside** Fortune rear diffuser. Custom **Rocket Bunny** rear overfenders (hand-laid fiberglass, 50mm wider than stock) to accommodate **Work Meister S1 3P** 16x9 +15 front / 16x10 +20 rear wheels (ET20 front, ET15 rear) with **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R** 215/45/16 front and 245/40/16 rear tires.

Interior stripped and reinforced with **Sparco** Pro ADV racing seats (fixed-back, 12.5kg each) mounted on **Bride** low-max recliners and **Custom Cages** bolt-in 6-point roll cage (1.75-inch x 0.120-inch DOM tubing, MIG-welded). **Defi Advance BF** 60mm oil pressure, boost, and wideband AFR gauges mounted in a **JDM Garage** carbon fiber triple-pod A-pillar gauge pod. **NRG Innovations** quick-release steering wheel hub with **Momo** Prototipo 330mm suede wheel and **Takata** 4-point harnesses (FIA-spec, cam-lock).

Aero package includes a **Tommy Kaira** M19 front lip spoiler (polyurethane, 35mm drop) and **C-West** Type-R rear wing (3-piece, carbon fiber, 1,200mm span, adjustable 0-20° angle). Custom **Voltex** side splitters (3D-printed ABS, 20mm extension) and **J's Racing** rear bumper diffuser (carbon fiber, 3-fin design). Paint scheme: **House of Kolor** Kandy Apple Red over **PPG** Black base, with **3M** 1080 gloss black vinyl roof and **Avery Dennison** satin gold pinstriping (1mm width).
